alkylation reagent: fixed modification of cysteine residues: +57.021 Da
fragmentation method: the MS/MS spectra were acquired in a data-dependent collision induced dissociation (CID) mode
instrument: LTQ Orbitrap Velos pro (Thermo Scientific, MA, USA) was used for mass spectrometric analysis.
labeling: LC-MS/MS technology based on the label-free quantitative (LFQ) proteomics strategy was utilized
